character.name: Female gunslinger, red hair tied
character.prompt:
Female gunslinger, red hair tied in loose updo, slim athletic build.
Worn dark-brown leather vest over dark shirt, dark pants, tall leather
boots, rift-marked bandana. Dual pistols holstered at hips. Minimal
cold-silver accent on gun barrel rift engravings only. No hand glow,
no purple. Dark fantasy pixel art, Diablo 2 / Hades style, heavy black
outline, muted palette with silver accent, transparent background.
